svg.title: Chunking and carry-over diagram
svg.desc: A step-by-step diagram showing how a text stream is split into chunks, how carry-over fragments are preserved, and how they are prepended to the next chunk to avoid splitting words.
svg.text: Source text (too big to load at once)
After the last chunk — flush any remaining carry directly into the word count.
No data is lost; every word is counted exactly once.
